actions.label: WiFi
actions.command: sh -c '[[ $SWAYNC_TOGGLE_STATE == true ]] && nmcli radio wifi on || nmcli radio wifi off'
actions.update-command: sh -c '[[ $(nmcli radio wifi) == "enabled" ]] && echo true || echo false'

actions.label: Bluetooth
actions.command: sh -c '[[ $SWAYNC_TOGGLE_STATE == true ]] && bluetoothctl power on || bluetoothctl power off'
actions.update-command: sh -c '[[ $(bluetoothctl show | grep Powered) == "Powered: yes" ]] && echo true || echo false'

actions.label: Airplane Mode
actions.command: sh -c '[[ $SWAYNC_TOGGLE_STATE == true ]] && nmcli radio all on || nmcli radio all off'
actions.update-command: sh -c '[[ $(nmcli radio all) == "enabled" ]] && echo false || echo true'

actions.label: Do Not Disturb
actions.update-command: swaync-client -swb | grep -q dnd && echo true || echo false
